case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS LONGORIO, ANTHONY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,624.80 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT LONGORIO, ANTHONY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-09-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LONGORIO, ANTHONY
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-09-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-10-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING MAILED TO DEFT RETURNED TO COURT: UNKNOWN AT ADDRESS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LONGORIO, ANTHONY $1,624.80 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,650.80 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
